title: Monthly income chart
excerpt:

posts.author: MTFAR (Ian Timbrell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using Monday.com to track individual clients for consultancy work. Each job is stored individually in a line with the date and invoice amount.

I’d like to create a chart which shows the projected income per month but I can’t work out how to group the items by month so I can see my income each month. Any help appreciated.

Screenshot 2024-09-24 at 09.00.341696×994 69.8 KB

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MTFAR ,
In the Chart settings, configure the X-axis to use the formatted month from your Formula column or the Date column (if grouping is enabled).

Set the Y-axis to the Deal Value column and choose the aggregation method (e.g., Sum) to display the total income per month.

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic
